problem_statement: Given an integer array arr of size N, sorted in ascending order (may contain duplicate values) and a target value k. Now the array is rotated at some pivot point unknown to you. Return True if k is present and otherwise, return False.

examples.explanation:
The element 3 is present in the array. So, the answer is True.

Example 2:
The element 10 is not present in the array. So, the answer is False.
